patch:
--- a/adder_with_carry.v
+++ b/adder_with_carry.v
@@ -1,12 +1,12 @@
 module adder_16bit(
   input [15:0] x, y,
   input cin,
   output reg [15:0] sum,
   output reg cout
 );
 
-  always @(x or y)
+  always @(x or y or cin)
   begin
     {cout, sum} = x + y + cin;
   end
 
 endmodule
before_code:
module adder_16bit(
  input [15:0] x, y,
  input cin,
  output reg [15:0] sum,
  output reg cout
);

  always @(x or y)
  begin
    {cout, sum} = x + y + cin;
  end

endmodule
after_code:
module adder_16bit(
  input [15:0] x, y,
  input cin,
  output reg [15:0] sum,
  output reg cout
);

  always @(x or y or cin)
  begin
    {cout, sum} = x + y + cin;
  end

endmodule
